hero.subheading: A local-first, open-source fitness tracker. No accounts, no tracking, and no cloud. Just you and your gains.

features.title: Built for Performance & Privacy
features.description: No telemetry, no tracking, no subscription. Just a powerful engine for your fitness journey.

strengthTracking.title: Offline Strength Tracking
strengthTracking.description: Log your sets and reps directly to your device. No internet required. Your data never leaves your pocket.

privacyFirst.title: Privacy First
privacyFirst.description: No sign-ups, no logins, and no third-party tracking. Musclog respects your digital sovereignty.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Musclog is community-driven. Audit the code, contribute features, or fork it to make it your own.

featureGrid.title: Everything You Need to Train Smarter
featureGrid.description: From AI-powered coaching to detailed analytics, Musclog gives you the tools to take full control of your fitness journey.

aiCoach.title: AI Coach (Loggy)
aiCoach.description: Chat with your AI fitness coach for personalized workout plans, nutrition advice, and meal photo estimation.

barcode.title: Barcode Scanner
barcode.description: Quickly add products by scanning barcodes. Access the Open Food Facts database with millions of products.

checkins.title: Weekly Check-ins
checkins.description: Automated 7-day analysis of your progress with dynamic goal adjustments to keep you on track.

analytics.title: Progress Analytics
analytics.description: Interactive charts for weight, body fat, and lifting progress. Track your TDEE with real data.

cycle.title: Cycle Awareness
cycle.description: Track menstrual phases and receive training recommendations optimized for your cycle.

templates.title: Workout Templates
templates.description: Create custom routines like PPL or Upper/Lower. Access an extensive exercise library with muscle targeting.

healthConnect.title: Health Connect
healthConnect.description: Sync with Google Health Connect to share data with other health and fitness apps on Android.

encryption.title: Encrypted Storage
encryption.description: Your sensitive health data is encrypted at rest using AES. Export anytime as JSON or Excel.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Get started in minutes. No complicated setup, no subscriptions, no data harvesting.

step1.title: Download & Go
step1.description: Install Musclog from the App Store or Google Play. No account required — just open and start tracking.

step2.title: Log Your Training
step2.description: Record sets, reps, and weights. Scan barcodes or snap photos to log meals. Everything stays on your device.

step3.title: Track Progress
step3.description: Review weekly check-ins, visualize trends, and let the AI coach help you optimize your approach.

testimonial.quote: "Musclog is the first app that respects my privacy while providing a world-class training experience. Local-first is the future."
testimonial.author: Laura F.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.description: Join thousands of athletes who use Musclog to track their progress without compromising privacy.

footer.copyright: Free & Open Source Software. Built for your privacy.
